card_description: The Russian is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick proposes a radical "mundane" theory: that he was "occupied" by a secret Christian Soviet doctor (or defected KGB operator) who used his brain to flee the "Gulag" (Black Iron Prison)."
